slack.isc_ref: PRD-P4:ISC-4 Slack posts follow channel severity rules

signal_velocity.description: Run /synthesize-signals to process accumulated learning signals
isc: New synthesis doc exists in memory/learning/synthesis/ | Verify: find memory/learning/synthesis -name '*.md' -newer orchestration/task_backlog.jsonl
New synthesis doc exists in memory/learning/synthesis/ | Verify: find memory/learning/synthesis -name '*.md' -newer orchestration/task_backlog.jsonl
Security audit report exists in history/security/ | Verify: find history/security -name '*audit*' -newer orchestration/task_backlog.jsonl

tool_failure_rate.description: Review tool failure patterns and diagnose root cause
isc: Failure analysis doc exists | Verify: find memory/learning/failures -name '*.md' -newer orchestration/task_backlog.jsonl

autonomous_signal_rate.description: Autonomous signal volume spike -- check per-producer breakdown in heartbeat detail, throttle or pause offending producer
isc: Autonomous signal rate is below warn threshold (10/day) | Verify: python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('data/heartbeat_latest.json')); print(d.get('autonomous_signal_rate',{}).get('value',0) < 10)"

stale_branches.description: Stale Jarvis branches need merge or discard -- run branch_lifecycle.py --notify for details
isc: No stale jarvis/* branches older than 7 days | Verify: python tools/scripts/branch_lifecycle.py --json

_collector_health.description: Heartbeat collector(s) failed to produce a value -- review _collector_health detail and fix the broken collector
isc: All heartbeat collectors return a numeric value (no errors) | Verify: python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('data/heartbeat_latest.json')); print(all(m.get('value') is not None for m in d.get('metrics',[])))"

network_connections.description: TCP connection count crossed threshold -- use lib/net_util attribution to find the leaking process before recommending action
isc: TCP connection count is back under the warn threshold, or the leaking process is identified and documented | Verify: Review

producer_health.description: One or more producers are reporting unhealthy -- review producer_health detail and fix/pause the offender
isc: All producers listed in orchestration/producers.json report healthy | Verify: python tools/scripts/verify_producer_health.py
No producer has been stale longer than 26h without an approved backlog row documenting the gap | Verify: Review

producer_recency.description: producer_recency watchdog reported stale producer(s) -- a corresponding pending_review row has already been injected by the watchdog; this entry is belt-and-suspenders coverage in case the watchdog inject fails
isc: The stale producer is either fixed, schedule corrected, or producers.json updated | Verify: python tools/scripts/verify_producer_health.py
No stale producer row remains open in pending_review without a human-approved plan | Verify: Review

signal_volume.description: Signal volume (raw+processed) crossed threshold -- likely an autonomous producer is over/under producing
isc: Signal volume is back within warn thresholds, or the offending producer is throttled/paused | Verify: Review

daily_alert_caps._isc_ref: PRD-P4:ISC-6 Slack notifier respects daily cap per channel
